tasks.title: Improve Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) Performance
tasks.description: Optimize the application to reduce Cumulative Layout Shift by implementing proper image sizing, font loading strategies, and element pre-allocation to improve Core Web Vitals.
tasks.details: 1. **Analyze Current CLS Issues**: Use browser DevTools and Lighthouse to identify specific elements causing layout shifts, focusing on recipe cards, images, and dynamic content loading. 2. **Implement Image Optimization**: Add explicit width/height attributes to all images, implement responsive image sizing with aspect-ratio CSS, and use placeholder elements for lazy-loaded content in recipe cards and galleries. 3. **Optimize Font Loading**: Implement font-display: swap for custom fonts, preload critical fonts in the HTML head, and use font-size-adjust to minimize layout shifts during font loading. 4. **Pre-allocate Dynamic Content**: Reserve space for dynamically loaded content like recipe cards, search results, and pagination components by using skeleton screens or fixed-height containers. 5. **Optimize Component Mounting**: Ensure Web Components in Shadow DOM don't cause layout shifts during initialization by pre-defining container dimensions and using CSS transforms instead of changing layout properties. 6. **Implement Proper Loading States**: Add consistent loading placeholders that match final content dimensions for all async operations including Firebase data fetching and image loading.
tasks.testStrategy: 1. **CLS Measurement**: Use Lighthouse CI to measure CLS scores before and after optimizations, aiming for a score below 0.1. Run tests on multiple page types including home, categories, and individual recipe pages. 2. **Visual Regression Testing**: Capture screenshots during page load to verify no unexpected layout shifts occur during content loading phases. 3. **Performance Testing**: Test on slow network connections (3G simulation) to ensure optimizations work under real-world conditions. 4. **Component Testing**: Verify that each Web Component loads without causing layout shifts by testing Shadow DOM mounting and content initialization. 5. **Cross-Browser Testing**: Test CLS improvements across different browsers and device sizes to ensure consistent performance gains.

tasks.title: Comprehensive Testing Suite for All Pages and Components
tasks.description: Implement extensive automated and manual testing coverage for all application pages, components, and user interactions to ensure quality and reliability.
tasks.details: 1. **Component Testing Setup**: Establish a comprehensive testing framework using Jest and Testing Library to test all Web Components in isolation, including Shadow DOM testing capabilities and custom element registration verification. 2. **Page-Level Integration Testing**: Create integration tests for all major pages (home, categories, recipes, user profile) that verify complete user workflows, navigation, data loading, and responsive behavior across different screen sizes. 3. **Visual Regression Testing**: Implement visual testing using tools like Playwright or Chromatic to capture screenshots of all pages and components, ensuring UI consistency across browsers and preventing unintended visual changes. 4. **Performance Testing**: Add automated performance tests that verify Core Web Vitals metrics (LCP, FID, CLS) for all pages, with specific attention to recipe loading times and image optimization effectiveness. 5. **Accessibility Testing**: Implement automated accessibility testing using axe-core to verify WCAG compliance across all components, including keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, and proper ARIA attributes. 6. **Cross-Browser Testing**: Set up automated testing across major browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) to ensure consistent functionality and appearance. 7. **Mobile Testing**: Create specific test suites for mobile interactions, touch events, and responsive design breakpoints. 8. **API Integration Testing**: Test all data fetching, recipe CRUD operations, user authentication flows, and error handling scenarios.
tasks.testStrategy: 1. **Unit Test Coverage**: Achieve minimum 90% code coverage for all components and utilities, with specific focus on edge cases and error conditions. 2. **End-to-End Testing**: Create comprehensive E2E test suites that cover complete user journeys including recipe browsing, searching, creating, editing, and user account management. 3. **Test Data Management**: Establish proper test data fixtures and mocking strategies for consistent and reliable test execution. 4. **Continuous Integration**: Integrate all tests into CI/CD pipeline with automated test execution on pull requests and deployments. 5. **Performance Benchmarks**: Set up automated performance monitoring that fails builds if Core Web Vitals thresholds are exceeded. 6. **Manual Testing Checklist**: Create comprehensive manual testing checklists for features that require human validation, including UX flows and edge case scenarios.

tasks.title: Replace Font Awesome CDN with local npm package
tasks.description: Install @fortawesome/fontawesome-free as a local dependency and replace CDN imports to improve performance and enable offline functionality.
tasks.details:
1. Install @fortawesome/fontawesome-free package via npm
2. Remove CDN import from filter-manager-styles.js and any other files
3. Import Font Awesome CSS locally in the appropriate bundler configuration or main CSS file
4. Update Shadow DOM components to properly load Font Awesome styles within shadow boundaries
5. Verify all existing Font Awesome icons continue to display correctly
6. Test icon rendering in both connected and offline environments
7. Update build process to include Font Awesome assets in the final bundle
8. Consider using CSS custom properties or CSS-in-JS approach for Shadow DOM icon styling if needed
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Verify all existing Font Awesome icons render correctly across all components
2. Test application functionality in offline mode to ensure icons still display
3. Run performance tests to confirm improved loading times without CDN dependency
4. Check Shadow DOM components specifically for proper icon rendering
5. Validate that no console errors occur related to missing Font Awesome resources
6. Test on different browsers to ensure cross-browser compatibility
7. Verify build process includes all necessary Font Awesome assets

tasks.title: Enhance Propose Recipe Form with Data Persistence and Navigation Protection
tasks.description: Implement form field persistence on page refresh and prevent accidental navigation when form contains data to improve user experience.
tasks.details:
1. Implement localStorage/sessionStorage to automatically save form field values as user types
2. Add form state restoration on page load to repopulate saved field values
3. Implement beforeunload event listener to detect unsaved changes and show confirmation dialog
4. Add form dirty state tracking to determine if form has been modified
5. Create utility functions for form data serialization/deserialization
6. Handle edge cases like form submission (clear saved data) and intentional navigation
7. Consider implementing debounced saving to optimize performance
8. Ensure compatibility with existing form validation and submission logic
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Fill out form fields, refresh page, verify all field values are restored
2. Fill out form, attempt to navigate away, confirm warning dialog appears
3. Submit form successfully, verify saved data is cleared from storage
4. Test with various field types (text, textarea, select, file uploads)
5. Verify performance with rapid typing (debounced saving works correctly)
6. Test browser back/forward navigation with unsaved changes
7. Verify functionality works across different browsers and devices

subtasks.title: Implement form data persistence utilities
subtasks.description: Create utility functions for saving and loading form data to/from localStorage with debounced saving to optimize performance
subtasks.details: Develop core utilities including: saveFormData() function with debounced saving (300ms delay), loadFormData() function to retrieve saved data, clearFormData() function to remove saved data, and data serialization/deserialization helpers. Include error handling for localStorage unavailability and implement namespacing to avoid conflicts with other app data.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for each utility function covering save/load/clear operations, debouncing behavior, error handling when localStorage is disabled, and data serialization accuracy

subtasks.title: Add form dirty state tracking system
subtasks.description: Implement a system to track whether the form has been modified from its initial state
subtasks.details: Create a form dirty state tracker that monitors form field changes, maintains initial form values for comparison, provides isDirty() method to check if form has unsaved changes, and integrates with existing form validation. Track changes on input, textarea, and select elements with proper event handling.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for dirty state detection covering initial state, field modifications, form reset scenarios, and edge cases like programmatic value changes

subtasks.title: Implement automatic form field persistence
subtasks.description: Add real-time saving of form field values as user types using the persistence utilities and dirty state tracking
subtasks.details: Integrate form field persistence by attaching debounced save handlers to form inputs, implementing automatic saving on blur events as backup, excluding sensitive fields from persistence if any, and ensuring compatibility with existing form components. Handle different input types (text, number, select, checkbox, etc.).
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests covering automatic saving during typing, persistence across different input types, debouncing behavior, and exclusion of sensitive fields

subtasks.title: Add form state restoration on page load
subtasks.description: Implement automatic restoration of saved form field values when the page loads or component mounts
subtasks.details: Create form restoration logic that loads saved data on component mount, populates form fields with saved values, handles cases where saved data structure doesn't match current form, and integrates with existing form initialization. Ensure proper handling of form validation after restoration.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for form restoration covering successful data loading, handling of missing or corrupted saved data, form validation after restoration, and compatibility with existing form initialization

subtasks.title: Implement navigation protection with beforeunload warning
subtasks.description: Add beforeunload event listener to warn users about unsaved changes and handle form submission cleanup
subtasks.details: Implement navigation protection using beforeunload event listener that shows confirmation dialog when form has unsaved changes, automatically clears saved data on successful form submission, handles intentional navigation scenarios, and provides user-friendly warning messages. Ensure proper cleanup of event listeners.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end tests covering navigation warnings with unsaved changes, no warning when form is clean, automatic cleanup on form submission, and proper event listener management

tasks.title: Add Recipe Image Suggestion Feature with Approval Workflow
tasks.description: Implement a comprehensive image suggestion system for recipes that includes entry points from recipe views, manager approval workflow, and image proposal components.
tasks.details:
1. Create recipe image suggestion entry points:
   - Add 'Suggest Image' button/link on recipe detail pages
   - Add image suggestion option in recipe edit forms
   - Implement context-aware entry points based on recipe completion status

2. Build image proposal component:
   - Create form for users to submit image URLs or upload files
   - Add image preview functionality with cropping/resizing options
   - Implement validation for image formats, sizes, and quality
   - Add fields for image attribution/source information
   - Include recipe association and tagging capabilities

3. Implement manager approval system:
   - Create admin dashboard for pending image suggestions
   - Build approval/rejection workflow with comments
   - Add notification system for suggestion status updates
   - Implement batch approval functionality for efficiency
   - Create audit trail for all approval decisions

4. Database schema updates:
   - Create image_suggestions table with fields for recipe_id, user_id, image_url, status, submitted_at, reviewed_at, reviewer_id
   - Add indexes for efficient querying by recipe and status
   - Implement soft delete for maintaining history

5. Integration points:
   - Connect with existing recipe management system
   - Integrate with user authentication and role management
   - Link with image storage and CDN services
   - Add analytics tracking for suggestion metrics
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Test recipe image suggestion entry points:
   - Verify 'Suggest Image' buttons appear on all recipe pages
   - Test suggestion form accessibility from recipe edit pages
   - Confirm proper recipe context is maintained through workflow

2. Test image proposal component:
   - Upload various image formats and verify validation
   - Test image preview and cropping functionality
   - Verify form submission with all required fields
   - Test error handling for invalid images or network issues

3. Test manager approval workflow:
   - Submit suggestions and verify they appear in admin dashboard
   - Test approval and rejection flows with comment functionality
   - Verify notification system sends appropriate status updates
   - Test batch approval with multiple suggestions

4. Integration testing:
   - Verify proper user authentication and authorization
   - Test database operations for all CRUD operations
   - Confirm image storage and retrieval functionality
   - Test cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness

5. End-to-end testing:
   - Complete full workflow from suggestion to approval
   - Test user permissions and role-based access control
   - Verify analytics tracking captures all events correctly

tasks.title: Add Media Instructions to Recipes - Proposal, Presentation and Suggestion Features
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive media instruction functionality including adding media to recipe proposals, displaying media in recipe presentation, and providing options to suggest new instruction media.
tasks.details:
1. Extend recipe proposal form with media instruction capabilities:
   - Add media upload/URL input fields for each instruction step
   - Implement drag-and-drop media upload interface
   - Add media type validation (images, videos, GIFs)
   - Create media preview components with edit/remove options
   - Integrate with existing form persistence system

2. Enhance recipe presentation with media display:
   - Create responsive media display components for instruction steps
   - Implement media carousel/gallery for multiple media per step
   - Add media zoom/fullscreen functionality
   - Optimize media loading and lazy loading for performance
   - Ensure proper media fallbacks and error handling

3. Build media suggestion system for existing recipes:
   - Create 'Suggest Media for Instructions' entry points on recipe pages
   - Implement step-specific media suggestion forms
   - Add media suggestion approval workflow integration
   - Create suggestion tracking and status display
   - Link with existing image suggestion infrastructure

4. Database and API enhancements:
   - Extend recipe instruction schema to include media fields
   - Create media suggestion API endpoints
   - Implement media storage and CDN integration
   - Add media metadata tracking (dimensions, file size, type)

5. User interface improvements:
   - Create consistent media interaction patterns
   - Add media accessibility features (alt text, captions)
   - Implement media compression and optimization
   - Design mobile-responsive media interfaces
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Test recipe proposal media functionality:
   - Upload various media types during recipe creation
   - Verify media persistence across form sessions
   - Test media validation and error handling
   - Confirm media preview and edit capabilities

2. Test recipe presentation media display:
   - View recipes with instruction media on different devices
   - Test media carousel navigation and controls
   - Verify media zoom and fullscreen functionality
   - Test media loading performance and fallbacks

3. Test media suggestion workflow:
   - Suggest media for existing recipe instructions
   - Verify suggestion forms are step-specific and contextual
   - Test suggestion submission and approval process
   - Confirm suggestion tracking and status updates

4. Test cross-device compatibility:
   - Verify media upload works on mobile devices
   - Test media display responsiveness
   - Confirm touch interactions work properly

5. Test accessibility and performance:
   - Verify alt text and caption functionality
   - Test media loading optimization
   - Confirm keyboard navigation support
   - Test with screen readers and accessibility tools

tasks.title: Categories Page Refactoring - Component Architecture Overhaul
tasks.description: Refactor the categories page by breaking it into independent, reusable components including unified recipe filter, recipe presentation grid, and simplified page logic to improve maintainability and reduce complexity.
tasks.details: This major architectural refactoring involves: 1) Extract recipe filtering logic into a unified, reusable RecipeFilter component that can handle multiple filter types (category, ingredients, difficulty, etc.) 2) Create a RecipeGrid component for consistent recipe presentation across the application 3) Simplify the main categories page by removing complex inline logic and delegating to the new components 4) Ensure proper prop passing and state management between components 5) Implement responsive design patterns for mobile and desktop views 6) Add proper TypeScript interfaces for component props 7) Extract any shared utilities into separate helper functions 8) Remove redundant code and consolidate similar functionality. The refactoring should maintain all existing functionality while significantly reducing the codebase size and improving code organization.
tasks.testStrategy: 1) Verify all existing categories page functionality works identically after refactoring 2) Test recipe filtering with various combinations of filters 3) Ensure recipe grid displays correctly on different screen sizes 4) Validate that component props are properly typed and passed 5) Test navigation between categories and individual recipes 6) Perform visual regression testing to ensure UI consistency 7) Verify that the new components can be reused in other parts of the application 8) Check that the refactored code has significantly fewer lines while maintaining the same features 9) Test performance to ensure no degradation in load times or user interactions

metadata.description: Completed project tasks and refactoring work

tasks.title: Implement Avatar Image Fallback to Icon
tasks.description: Create a fallback mechanism where avatar images automatically display a default icon when the user image fails to load or is unavailable.
tasks.details: Implement an avatar component that handles image loading errors gracefully. When a user's profile image fails to load (404, network error, or missing src), the component should automatically display a default user icon instead of a broken image placeholder. This involves: 1) Creating or updating an Avatar component with onError handling, 2) Adding a default user icon (could be SVG or icon font), 3) Implementing proper error state management, 4) Ensuring the fallback icon maintains consistent styling with avatar dimensions, 5) Adding loading states if needed, 6) Testing various failure scenarios including slow networks and missing images.
tasks.testStrategy: Test avatar fallback by: 1) Providing invalid image URLs and verifying icon appears, 2) Testing with slow network to ensure loading states work, 3) Testing with valid images to ensure normal display, 4) Verifying icon styling matches avatar container dimensions, 5) Testing across different screen sizes and devices, 6) Checking accessibility with screen readers, 7) Testing rapid switching between valid and invalid image sources.

tasks.title: Setup Google Cloud Pub/Sub Infrastructure
tasks.description: Create and configure Google Cloud Pub/Sub topic, subscription, and service accounts for recipe transfer messaging
tasks.details: Create 'recipe-transfers' topic and 'cookbook-transfers' subscription in Google Cloud Console. Set up service account with pubsub.publisher role for demo app and pubsub.subscriber role for cookbook app. Configure dead letter queue for failed message handling. Install @google-cloud/pubsub v4.x in demo app. Set retention policy to 7 days and acknowledgment deadline to 600 seconds for image processing time.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify topic and subscription creation through Google Cloud Console. Test service account permissions by publishing and consuming test messages. Validate dead letter queue configuration with intentionally failed messages.

tasks.title: Implement Recipe Data Packaging Service
tasks.description: Create service to fetch complete recipe data from demo app's Supabase and generate signed URLs for images
tasks.details: Create CookbookTransferService class in demo app. Implement fetchCompleteRecipe() method to retrieve recipe data including all related images from Supabase. Use Supabase storage.createSignedUrl() with 24-hour expiry for each image. Package data into message schema format with recipe data, signed image URLs, and metadata (userId, userEmail, sourceType, timestamp). Handle error cases for missing images or invalid recipe data.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for data packaging with mock Supabase responses. Integration tests with real recipe data. Verify signed URLs are valid and accessible. Test error handling for missing or corrupted recipe data.

tasks.title: Create Firebase Cloud Function for Recipe Processing
tasks.description: Implement Cloud Function triggered by Pub/Sub messages to process recipe transfers in cookbook app
tasks.details: Create processRecipeTransfer Firebase Function v2 with Pub/Sub trigger. Configure function with 5-minute timeout, 1GB memory, and pubsub.subscriber trigger. Implement message parsing, error handling with automatic retries (max 3 attempts), and dead letter queue integration. Use Firebase Admin SDK for Firestore operations. Add structured logging for debugging and monitoring. Handle malformed messages gracefully.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with mock Pub/Sub messages. Integration tests with Firebase Functions Emulator. Test timeout scenarios and memory usage with large payloads. Verify retry logic and dead letter queue behavior.

tasks.title: Implement Data Transformation and Schema Mapping
tasks.description: Create service to transform demo app recipe format to cookbook app format with proper field mapping
tasks.details: Create RecipeTransformationService in cookbook function. Implement schema mapping: cook_time → waitTime, map demo categories to cookbook categories, handle prep_time and total_time fields. Add transfer metadata fields (source: 'demo-app', transferredAt: timestamp, approved: false, confidence: 'high'). Create validation functions for required fields. Handle missing or invalid data gracefully with default values.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with various recipe formats and edge cases. Schema validation tests to ensure cookbook format compliance. Test category mapping accuracy and fallback handling for unknown categories.

tasks.title: Implement Image Transfer and Storage System
tasks.description: Download images from signed URLs and upload to Firebase Storage with cookbook naming conventions
tasks.details: Create ImageTransferService in cookbook function. Use node-fetch or axios to download images from signed URLs with timeout handling (30s per image). Validate image formats (JPEG, PNG, WebP) and file sizes (max 10MB). Upload to Firebase Storage under /recipes/{recipeId}/images/ with UUID filenames. Generate pendingImages array for admin approval. Implement retry logic for failed downloads and graceful error handling for expired URLs.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with mock image downloads and uploads. Integration tests with real signed URLs and Firebase Storage. Test error scenarios including expired URLs, large files, and network timeouts. Verify image integrity after transfer.

tasks.title: Create Transfer UI Components
tasks.description: Build user interface components for single and batch recipe transfers in demo app
tasks.details: Create TransferButton component using React/Vue with cookbook branding (icon from lucide-react or similar). Add loading states, success/error feedback with react-hot-toast notifications. Create BatchTransferButton for multiple recipe selection with checkbox interface. Implement progress modal showing transfer status for each recipe. Show buttons only to authenticated users. Use optimistic UI updates with rollback on failure.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests with React Testing Library or Vue Test Utils. User interaction tests for button clicks and loading states. Accessibility tests for keyboard navigation and screen readers. Visual regression tests for different states.

tasks.title: Integrate Recipe Storage with Approval Workflow
tasks.description: Store transformed recipes in Firestore and integrate with existing cookbook admin approval system
tasks.details: Save transformed recipes to Firestore /recipes collection with approved: false flag. Ensure recipes enter existing admin approval workflow without modification. Add transfer-specific fields (transferSource: 'demo-app', originalId, transferredBy, reviewNotes). Create batch write operations for efficiency. Implement transaction handling for consistency. Add indexes for efficient querying of pending transfers.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests with Firestore emulator. Verify recipes appear in admin dashboard. Test batch operations and transaction rollback scenarios. Performance tests for large recipe imports.

tasks.title: Implement End-to-End Testing and Monitoring
tasks.description: Create comprehensive testing suite and monitoring dashboard for the complete transfer pipeline
tasks.details: Create E2E tests using Playwright or Cypress covering complete transfer flow from demo app button click to cookbook storage. Implement monitoring with Google Cloud Monitoring for transfer success rate (>95% target), function execution time (<2min average), and message queue depth. Set up alerts for high error rates, function timeouts, and dead letter queue accumulation. Create health check endpoints for both services. Add performance logging and error tracking with structured logs.
tasks.testStrategy: E2E test scenarios including successful transfers, error cases, and batch operations. Load testing with concurrent transfers. Monitoring dashboard validation with test metrics. Alert testing with simulated failure conditions.

tasks.title: Create SectionedListComponent Base Class
tasks.description: Develop a generic sectioned list component that extends DynamicListComponent to support both flat lists and grouped sections with dynamic mode switching.
tasks.details: ✅ TASK COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY - SectionedListComponent fully implemented in src/lib/recipes/recipe_form_component/parts/sectioned-list-component.js (735 lines). Features implemented: Dynamic mode switching between 'flat' and 'sectioned' modes with data preservation, comprehensive section management (add, remove, move), data format conversion handling both flat arrays and sectioned objects, event system with proper Shadow DOM propagation, section-aware validation with error highlighting, memory management with proper lifecycle cleanup. Architecture uses Strategy Pattern for mode-specific behavior, Template Method for extensible rendering, Observer Pattern for event-driven communication, and Shadow DOM encapsulation. Complete API includes switchToFlatMode()/switchToSectionedMode(), addSection(title)/removeSection(index)/moveSection(from, to), getData()/populateData(data) with automatic format detection, getSections()/getMode()/isFlatMode()/isSectionedMode(). Ready for extension by specific implementations like ingredient and instruction lists.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for mode switching, section management operations, data format conversion, and validation integration. Test data preservation during mode changes, proper event dispatching, and Shadow DOM rendering. Verify inheritance from DynamicListComponent works correctly.

tasks.title: Create RecipeInstructionsList Component
tasks.description: Build instructions component extending SectionedListComponent with Hebrew stage support and backward compatibility with existing instruction formats.
tasks.details: Create RecipeInstructionsList component extending SectionedListComponent for single-field instructions. Configure for Hebrew interface with 'שלב' section titles and 'הוסף שלב' mode switching button. Support current stage-based architecture and simple instruction arrays for backward compatibility. Implement getInstructions() and populateInstructions() API methods. Handle both instruction formats: simple arrays and stage objects with titles. Include proper RTL text handling and validation for Hebrew content. Ensure event propagation works with existing form validation system.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for Hebrew text handling, RTL layout, mode switching between flat and sectioned modes, data population from both instruction formats, and validation integration. Test backward compatibility with existing recipe data structures.

tasks.title: Integrate Instructions Component into Main Form
tasks.description: Replace embedded instructions DOM with RecipeInstructionsList component and remove 150+ lines of instructions logic from main component.
tasks.details: Update recipe_form_component.js template to use <recipe-instructions-list> element instead of embedded DOM. Remove instructions-related methods (addStepLine, removeStepLine, addStage, removeStage, convertToStageFormat, updateStageNumbers) totaling ~150 lines. Update setupEventListeners() to remove instructions event handlers. Modify setRecipeData() to use component API for instructions population. Update form-data-collector.js to use component API instead of DOM queries. Ensure validation and state management work with component-based architecture.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests verifying all existing instruction functionality works through component API. Test recipe data loading and saving with both instruction formats. Verify event propagation and validation work correctly. Regression testing to ensure no functionality is lost.

tasks.title: Design Ingredient Sections Data Model
tasks.description: Design backward-compatible data structure for sectioned ingredients supporting both flat arrays and grouped sections.
tasks.details: Design new data structure supporting mode-based ingredients: { mode: 'sectioned'|'flat', sections: [{title: string, items: [ingredient objects]}] } for sectioned mode, or simple array for flat mode. Ensure backward compatibility with existing flat ingredient arrays. Create data detection utilities to identify format during recipe loading. Design migration strategy for existing recipes without requiring database changes. Include validation schemas for both formats and conversion utilities between formats.
tasks.testStrategy: Schema validation tests for both data formats. Data conversion testing between flat and sectioned formats. Backward compatibility verification with existing recipe data. Migration testing with sample recipe datasets.

tasks.title: Update Recipe Data Utilities for Ingredient Sections
tasks.description: Modify recipe data handling utilities to support both flat and sectioned ingredient formats with proper validation and conversion.
tasks.details: Update recipe-data-utils.js to handle sectioned ingredient format. Modify formatRecipeData() to detect and handle both ingredient formats. Update validateRecipeData() with sectioned ingredient validation rules. Create conversion utilities: convertToSectionedIngredients() and convertToFlatIngredients(). Update form-data-collector.js to support component API for sectioned ingredients. Ensure proper error handling and data sanitization for both formats.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for data format detection, conversion utilities, and validation with both ingredient formats. Integration tests with form data collection. Test error handling for malformed ingredient data.

tasks.title: Update Recipe Presentation Components for Ingredient Sections
tasks.description: Modify recipe display components to render sectioned ingredients with proper Hebrew section headers and responsive layout.
tasks.details: Update recipe-card components to display ingredient sections with proper Hebrew section headers. Modify recipe detail views to show collapsible ingredient sections. Update recipe print layouts for sectioned ingredients with clear section breaks. Ensure mobile-responsive section display with proper RTL text handling. Add fallback rendering for flat ingredient format. Use CSS Grid or Flexbox for responsive section layouts.
tasks.testStrategy: Visual regression tests for recipe displays with sectioned ingredients. Responsive design tests across different screen sizes. RTL text rendering verification. Print layout testing for sectioned format.

tasks.title: Migrate RecipeIngredientsList to SectionedListComponent
tasks.description: Refactor existing ingredients component to extend SectionedListComponent architecture while maintaining current functionality.
tasks.details: Update RecipeIngredientsList to extend SectionedListComponent instead of DynamicListComponent. Add section management UI initially hidden with 'Add Section' button. Update component to handle both flat and sectioned ingredient data. Maintain existing three-field configuration (quantity, unit, item). Implement backward compatibility for existing recipes. Update validation to work with sectioned data structure. Ensure API methods (getIngredients, populateIngredients) work with both formats.
tasks.testStrategy: Component migration tests verifying identical functionality after inheritance change. Test section management UI interactions. Verify backward compatibility with existing ingredient data. Test validation works with both flat and sectioned formats.

tasks.title: Implement Real-time Validation Enhancement
tasks.description: Add real-time validation feedback with debounced validation calls and progressive status indicators across all form components.
tasks.details: Implement debounced validation (300ms delay) on field changes using modern event delegation. Add progressive validation hints showing field completion status and character counts where appropriate. Create visual feedback states for form validation (pending, valid, invalid). Implement cross-component validation dependencies ensuring ingredients and instructions are validated together. Use modern Web API features like IntersectionObserver for efficient validation triggers. Add validation state management utilities that work across Shadow DOM boundaries.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for debounced validation timing and progressive feedback. Integration tests for cross-component validation. Performance tests ensuring validation doesn't block UI. Accessibility tests for validation feedback with screen readers.

tasks.title: Add Section Management UI Features
tasks.description: Create intuitive section management interfaces with drag-and-drop reordering and bulk operations for both ingredients and instructions.
tasks.details: Implement drag-and-drop section reordering using modern Drag and Drop API or library like @dnd-kit/core for better accessibility. Add section collapse/expand functionality with CSS transitions and proper ARIA attributes. Create bulk operations UI for moving items between sections with checkbox selection. Implement section templates and presets for common ingredient groupings (dry ingredients, wet ingredients, spices). Add keyboard shortcuts for power users (Ctrl+Enter for new section, Ctrl+D for duplicate). Ensure all interactions work properly in RTL Hebrew interface.
tasks.testStrategy: User interaction tests for drag-and-drop functionality. Accessibility tests for keyboard navigation and screen readers. Test bulk operations with various selection scenarios. Verify RTL interface interactions work correctly.

tasks.title: Performance Optimization for Sectioned Lists
tasks.description: Optimize component performance for large sectioned lists with virtual scrolling and efficient DOM updates.
tasks.details: Implement virtual scrolling for large sections using modern libraries like @tanstack/react-virtual or custom solution with IntersectionObserver. Add lazy loading for section content that only renders visible sections. Optimize DOM updates using DocumentFragment for batch operations. Implement efficient memory management for large recipe data with cleanup on component unmount. Use modern performance APIs like PerformanceObserver to monitor component performance. Add debounced resize handling for responsive updates.
tasks.testStrategy: Performance benchmarks with large datasets (100+ ingredients, 50+ instructions). Memory usage testing during extended form interactions. Load time testing for components with large data sets. Verify virtual scrolling works smoothly across different devices.

tasks.title: Comprehensive Sectioned Architecture Testing
tasks.description: Create thorough test suite covering the complete sectioned architecture with unit, integration, and end-to-end testing.
tasks.details: Create comprehensive test suite using Jest and Testing Library for Web Components. Include unit tests for SectionedListComponent base class covering mode switching, section management, and data handling. Add integration tests for component interactions and event propagation through Shadow DOM. Test data format conversion and backward compatibility with existing recipe structures. Include cross-component validation testing and form submission workflows. Use modern testing patterns like custom element testing utilities and Shadow DOM query helpers.
tasks.testStrategy: Achieve 95%+ code coverage for all new components. Create test fixtures for various recipe data formats. Run tests across different browser environments. Include performance regression tests comparing before/after metrics.

tasks.title: User Acceptance Testing and Migration Verification
tasks.description: Conduct comprehensive testing with real recipe data and complete user workflows to ensure seamless migration and enhanced functionality.
tasks.details: Perform comprehensive user acceptance testing with real recipe data from production. Test migration scenarios with existing recipes ensuring no data loss or corruption. Verify new sectioned recipe creation workflows work intuitively. Test mode switching and data preservation across different usage patterns. Conduct performance testing with complex sectioned data and large ingredient lists. Include accessibility testing with screen readers and keyboard navigation. Run cross-browser compatibility tests and mobile device testing. Verify that main component target of <400 lines is achieved.
tasks.testStrategy: Execute complete user journey tests from recipe creation to editing and viewing. Test with various recipe complexities and data formats. Verify performance meets targets (main component <400 lines). Include accessibility audit with automated tools and manual testing. Conduct usability testing with actual users if possible.
